bullets: Transitioned from an external consulting role to join Takeda as a full-time Senior MuleSoft Developer, reflecting direct recognition of technical contributions delivered during the engagement
Continued to own and evolve the enterprise integration landscape, driving stability, performance, and scalability of mission-critical MuleSoft APIs across the organization
Collaborated closely with internal business and technology stakeholders to align integration architecture with evolving Salesforce Health Cloud and CRM roadmap requirements
Took on expanded ownership of the HCP onboarding and data synchronization pipelines, ensuring continuous improvement and reliability of key pharmaceutical commercial processes

Pioneered the adoption of AI-assisted development practices in day-to-day project activities, leveraging AI tools to accelerate integration design, code generation, documentation, and troubleshooting — driving measurable improvements in developer productivity

Built a custom AI-powered utility to migrate existing MuleSoft applications from Secure Properties to HashiCorp Vault, automating the transition to enterprise-grade secrets management and improving security posture across the integration landscape

Designed and deployed a custom Splunk dashboard to generate real-time operational metrics around the HCP onboarding pipeline, providing visibility into lead creation volumes, auto-match rates, and qualification trends — enabling data-driven decisions for business and operations teams
experience.title: Data Integration Engineer (MuleSoft)

bullets: Embarked on a career as a MuleSoft Developer, gaining hands-on expertise in the Anypoint Platform, integration design, and API lifecycle management within a financial services domain

Developed RESTful APIs following API-Led Connectivity principles, structuring solutions across Experience, Process, and System layers to maximize reusability, maintainability, and scalability across enterprise systems

Designed and implemented file-based integrations leveraging event-driven architecture patterns, enabling reliable, asynchronous processing of high-volume data exchanges with fault tolerance and decoupled system communication
Contributed to the end-to-end integration of core financial systems, ensuring secure, compliant, and performant data flows between banking/finance platforms and downstream applications
Awarded GoMx Phoenix award for excellent ownership, dedication and trust
experience.title: Software Engineer

bullets: Spearheaded integration development for a global pharmaceutical client, architecting enterprise-grade MuleSoft solutions across a diverse technology ecosystem including Salesforce Health Cloud, SendGrid, SpotMe, and OneTrust

Designed and delivered API-Led RESTful APIs following Experience, Process, and System layer architecture, enabling seamless integration between mobile applications and Salesforce Health Cloud with maximum reusability and scalability

Built robust file-based integrations using event-driven patterns to reliably sync high-volume data from external vendors into Salesforce Health Cloud, ensuring data integrity and operational continuity

Engineered end-to-end HCP (Healthcare Professional) onboarding APIs into Salesforce CRM, incorporating automated matching logic, lead generation workflows, and lead qualification processes — significantly reducing manual intervention in the onboarding lifecycle
Drove a 30% reduction in lead creation time and manual qualification effort by integrating IQVIA data into the HCP matching process, improving data accuracy and accelerating the onboarding pipeline
Ensured compliance and data privacy adherence across integrations by working within OneTrust governance frameworks, critical for pharmaceutical regulatory standards
experience.title: Senior Software Engineer

name: Rohan Londhe
summary: I am a certified MuleSoft developer with over 6 years of experience in designing and building robust API integrations. My expertise spans across integrating various platforms, including Salesforce, SendGrid, and more. I am passionate about leveraging MuleSoft to create seamless and efficient solutions that drive business success.
